title: Stop asking "Which AI is the best?" Start asking "Best at what?"
description: That one shift changed how I work entirely. I run 6 different AI models in my daily workflow — each for a specific job. Here's why picking the right tool matters more than picking the "best" tool.

title: Google ranking was the game. AI recommendation is the new game.
description: Most websites aren't even on the field yet. AI agents — ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude — are becoming the new search engine. Here's what AEO and GEO mean for your visibility strategy.

title: Nobody explained LLMs.txt properly. So let me do it in plain English.
description: You know how robots.txt tells Google which pages to crawl — LLMs.txt does the same for AI models. Here's how it works and why every marketer needs to know about it.
